query:
INSERT INTO drive_push_queue
  (target_folder, target_subpath, file_name, content_text, mime_type, status, created_at)
VALUES
  ('future_worksheets', '', 'README.md',
   '# Future Worksheets — planning bench

This folder is a pre-built grab-bag of worksheets and printables that line up with what Reagan is working on over the next 2-3 weeks. Pull from here when she finishes early, when you are planning ahead, or when she wants extra practice.

## Layout

- **Math/** — decimals, multi-digit multiplication, line plots, volume & units
- **ELA/** — independent reading, essay prompts, context clues, presenting findings
- **Science/** — matter & interactions, conservation, scientific method
- **Social Studies/** — government & economics unit 4
- **Fun extras/** — mazes, coloring, nature scavenger hunts, journal prompts
- **Specials/** — minimal: one anxiety-trigger sheet, one gratitude page

Each subject folder has a `_index.md` planning card that lists the topics to practice + free online sources. Drop actual PDFs into the matching subject folder as you generate them or print them.

_Last refreshed by the dashboard. Edit freely — the dashboard never overwrites your additions._
',
   'text/markdown', 'pending', NOW()),

  ('future_worksheets', 'Math', '_index.md',
   '# Math — next 2-3 weeks

## Topics Reagan is working on (Topics 10-12 are open)
- Place value & decimals to thousandths
- Multi-digit multiplication & division
- Story problems / mixed practice (Topic PS-1)
- Line plots (Topic 10)
- Volume & unit cubes (Topic 11)
- Customary & metric measurement conversions (Topic 12)

## Free online sources to print from
- Khan Academy 5th grade math — https://www.khanacademy.org/math/cc-fifth-grade-math
- K5 Learning free worksheets — https://www.k5learning.com/free-math-worksheets/fifth-grade-5
- Math-Drills free PDFs — https://www.math-drills.com/
- Super Teacher Worksheets (free samples) — https://www.superteacherworksheets.com/full-math.html
- Common Core Sheets — https://www.commoncoresheets.com/

## Tip
- For Topic 10 line plots, search "line plot fractions 5th grade pdf" — these are the most-needed right now.
- For Topic 12, customary <-> metric, K5 has a full conversion practice pack.
',
   'text/markdown', 'pending', NOW()),

  ('future_worksheets', 'ELA', '_index.md',
   '# ELA — next 2-3 weeks

## Topics Reagan is working on
- Independent reading comprehension (Michael''s World style)
- Writing an essay on a topic of choice
- Context clues / determining word meaning
- Presenting findings (research project)
- Module 4 — Breaking Barriers

## Free online sources
- CommonLit free passages — https://www.commonlit.org/en/library
- ReadWorks free passages — https://www.readworks.org/
- Newsela free tier — https://newsela.com/
- K5 Learning ELA — https://www.k5learning.com/free-worksheets-for-kids/fifth-grade-5/reading
- Super Teacher ELA — https://www.superteacherworksheets.com/full-reading.html

## Tip
- For independent reading, pair a CommonLit passage with a "context clues" worksheet — kills two topics in one block.
- Writing prompts: keep a folder of 10-15 single-page prompts so Reagan can pick.
',
   'text/markdown', 'pending', NOW()),

  ('future_worksheets', 'Science', '_index.md',
   '# Science — next 2-3 weeks

## Topics
- Matter & its interactions (Unit 4)
- Conservation of matter in physical & chemical change
- Scientific method — observation logs

## Free online sources
- NASA Kids'' Club — https://www.nasa.gov/kidsclub
- Mystery Science free lessons — https://mysteryscience.com/
- Generation Genius free samples — https://www.generationgenius.com/
- Ohio Science Standards 5th grade — https://education.ohio.gov/Topics/Learning-in-Ohio/Science

## Tip
- Conservation of matter: a simple "before & after weighing" observation log printable is the most useful right now.
- Add a bird-watching observation log for outdoor science blocks.
',
   'text/markdown', 'pending', NOW()),

  ('future_worksheets', 'Social Studies', '_index.md',
   '# Social Studies — next 2-3 weeks

## Topics
- Unit 4 — Government & Economics
- Purpose & structure of government
- Scarcity, trade, and economic choices

## Free online sources
- iCivics free lessons — https://www.icivics.org/
- Ohio Social Studies model curriculum — https://education.ohio.gov/Topics/Learning-in-Ohio/Social-Studies
- Constitution Center for Kids — https://constitutioncenter.org/learn
- Ben''s Guide to U.S. Government — https://bensguide.gpo.gov/

## Tip
- iCivics "Branches of Power" is interactive and counts as a structure-of-government lesson.
',
   'text/markdown', 'pending', NOW()),

  ('future_worksheets', 'Fun extras', '_index.md',
   '# Fun extras — grab-bag for finished-early time

Keep this folder stocked with printables Reagan can choose from when she finishes blocks early or wants a cozy activity.

## Suggested categories
- Mazes — easy + hard (Krazy Dad has tons of free ones)
- Coloring pages — nature, animals, mandalas
- Word searches — vocabulary or themed
- Nature scavenger hunts (yard, park, walk)
- Journal prompts — single page, illustrated
- Gratitude pages — "3 things today"
- Bird-watching log — for the parakeet-loving kid
- Origami one-page instructions

## Free sources
- Krazy Dad mazes — https://krazydad.com/mazes/
- Education.com free coloring — https://www.education.com/worksheets/coloring/
- Crayola printables — https://www.crayola.com/free-coloring-pages/
- Audubon bird coloring — https://www.audubon.org/coloring-book
',
   'text/markdown', 'pending', NOW()),

  ('future_worksheets', 'Specials', '_index.md',
   '# Specials — minimal set

Keep this folder small. Reagan does not need a full SEL toolkit — just one or two pages on hand.

## What to keep
- One anxiety-trigger reflection sheet (already in use)
- One gratitude journal page (3 things today)

## Optional
- A breathing exercise card
- A mood color wheel

_Avoid stacking heavy SEL content here. Less is more._
',
   'text/markdown', 'pending', NOW());
